steps.title: Restrict to the condition
steps.content:
Use only the $10$ to $19$ and $20+$ age groups.
$$
30+30=60
$$

steps.title: Count group A participants
steps.content:
In those same columns, group A has
$$
14+9=23
$$

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content: Divide the group A count by the conditioned total. $$ 23\div 60=0.3833 $$ The answer is .3833.
